name: WW Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup rye flour (or another cup WW flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients.
2. Add 1 cup mashed banana (or applesauce) and enough rice milk to form a batter-like consistency.
3. Carefully fry in a nonstick or Pam-sprayed pan. Optionally, add cinnamon, nutmeg, or half a cup of undercooked 7-grain cereal for added flavor.
